ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., Resident Any-Sex Tags) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., resident, non-resident, deer hunting) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the license */,
  "license_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the license in days */,
  "eligible_species" TEXT /* Species eligible for hunting */,
  "required_license" INTEGER /* Required license for this license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., online, POS, mail-in) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sales channel */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Is the sales channel active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license being purchased */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending) */,
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_purchases_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES license_sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_purchases_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_purchases_delivery_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_method_id") REFERENCES license_delivery_methods ("delivery_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "email_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_license_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license */,
  "dependent_license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_license_dependencies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_license_dependencies_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bundle */,
  "bundle_type" TEXT /* Type of bundle (e.g., hunting, fishing) */,
  "bundle_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundle_licenses" (
  "bundle_license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle-license pair */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bundle */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license included in the bundle */,
  "license_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the license in the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_licenses_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_fee" TEXT /* Fee charged by the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_services" (
  "email_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email service */,
  "email_service_name" TEXT /* Name of the email service (e.g., Mailchimp, Sendgrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the email service */,
  "email_template" TEXT /* Template for emails sent by the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_delivery_methods" (
  "delivery_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery method */,
  "delivery_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery method (e.g., email, mail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the delivery method */,
  "delivery_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the delivery method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_purchase_history" (
  "purchase_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase history entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, purchase) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
